Name: BGB Tech
Description:
BGB Tech – Autoryzowany Przedstawiciel VTA Austria w Polsce

BGB Tech to innowacyjna firma, która specjalizuje się w nowoczesnych technologiach ochrony środowiska. Jako autoryzowany przedstawiciel firmy VTA Austria w Polsce dostarczamy zaawansowane rozwiązania w zakresie oczyszczania ścieków i poprawy jakości wody. VTA to globalny lider w dziedzinie technologii uzdatniania wody, znany z ekologicznych i wysokoefektywnych produktów, które optymalizują procesy oczyszczania i zwiększają efektywność pracy oczyszczalni ścieków.

Produkty i technologie VTA

Oferta VTA obejmuje innowacyjne preparaty i systemy do:
	•	Optymalizacji procesów oczyszczania ścieków – zaawansowane flokulanty, które poprawiają sedymentację osadów i redukują obciążenie ścieków,
	•	Redukcji odorów i emisji gazów – specjalistyczne środki eliminujące nieprzyjemne zapachy oraz zmniejszające emisję siarkowodoru i amoniaku,
	•	Poprawy stabilności osadów ściekowych – rozwiązania wspomagające procesy fermentacji, redukcję ilości osadów i ich dalsze wykorzystanie,
	•	Zabezpieczania infrastruktury oczyszczalni – innowacyjne preparaty minimalizujące korozję i osadzanie się kamienia w instalacjach.

Nasze autorskie rozwiązania

BGB Tech nie tylko dostarcza technologie VTA, ale również aktywnie rozwija własne, innowacyjne rozwiązania bazujące na nanotechnologii. Skupiamy się na tworzeniu nowoczesnych preparatów i systemów, które jeszcze skuteczniej wspierają procesy oczyszczania ścieków, poprawiają efektywność eksploatacyjną oczyszczalni oraz przyczyniają się do ochrony środowiska.

Dzięki współpracy z VTA Austria oraz naszym autorskim badaniom, BGB Tech wyznacza nowe standardy w branży. Naszym celem jest dostarczanie ekologicznych i efektywnych rozwiązań, które pomagają naszym klientom działać bardziej zrównoważenie i ekonomicznie.

Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Nous utilisons des équipements de haute technologie, adaptés à chaque situation, afin de réaliser des diagnostics précis et fournir des rapports détaillés. Chaque intervention inclut des recommandations claires pour résoudre les sinistres détectés.

Name: Introductie Duurzaam Stortbeheer
Description:
Per jaar produceren we in Nederland ongeveer 60 miljoen ton afval. Verreweg het meeste van dit afval kunnen we recyclen of op een andere manier nuttig toepassen. Van de 60 miljoen ton blijft hierdoor minder dan twee miljoen ton afval over. Dit afval belandt op een stortplaats. Op deze stortplaats blijft het afval – zorgvuldig ingepakt en continu gemonitord – voor altijd liggen. Dit ingepakte afval vraagt eeuwigdurende controle en onderhoud om te voorkomen dat de omgeving verontreinigd raakt.

Dit is de aanleiding voor de afvalbranche, de provincies en het ministerie van Infrastructuur en Waterstaat om te onderzoeken of een andere en meer duurzame werkwijze bestaat. Gezamenlijk is het programma introductie Duurzaam Stortbeheer (iDS) vormgegeven. Centraal staat de vraag of het mogelijk is verontreiniging binnen de stortplaats onschadelijk te maken. Dat is belangrijk voor ons en voor toekomstige generaties, die we niet willen belasten met ons afval.

Op 1 juli 2016 is het tien jaar durende experiment Duurzaam Stortbeheer officieel gestart. In 2021 heeft een tussenevaluatie plaatsgevonden.

DAL 2006 UN PERFETTO CONNUBIO TRA PASSIONE E COMPETENZA

Idroclima è un’azienda che ha fatto il suo ingresso nel settore termoidraulico nel 2006, con l’ambizione di rivoluzionare questo campo attraverso un perfetto connubio tra passione e competenza. Fin dall’inizio, la missione di Idroclima è stata quella di valorizzare l’artigianato, integrandolo con le più moderne tecnologie disponibili, per offrire soluzioni innovative e di alta qualità.
Il cuore della nostra proposta è la realizzazione di progetti completamente personalizzati, mirati a soddisfare le esigenze specifiche di ogni cliente. Questo approccio su misura ci distingue dalle soluzioni standardizzate offerte da altre realtà del settore. Ogni progetto inizia con un’attenta valutazione delle necessità del cliente, tramite un sopralluogo effettuato da un tecnico specializzato, e continua con la formulazione di un preventivo dettagliato che rispecchia le reali necessità e aspettative del cliente.

Tuttavia, il nostro impegno non si esaurisce con l’installazione dei sistemi. Ci distinguiamo per il servizio post-installazione, che include manutenzione ed eventuale assistenza continua. Questo impegno garantisce che le soluzioni offerte rimangano efficienti e performanti nel tempo.
Per assicurare un supporto completo e professionale, abbiamo scelto di diventare Centro Assistenza Autorizzato per i marchi che installa. Questo status ci permette di offrire un servizio di assistenza qualificato e direttamente supportato dai produttori, assicurando così al cliente un alto livello di affidabilità e competenza.
In sintesi, Idroclima non è solo un fornitore di soluzioni termoidrauliche, ma un partner dedicato a creare esperienze personalizzate e durature, garantendo un servizio completo che va ben oltre l’installazione iniziale.

a)	Entgeltkalkulation und Entgeltmodelle

Auf Basis von Excel VBA haben wir Tools erstellt, die unseren aktuell 25 Kunden (2023) bei der Kalkulation und Analyse ihrer Strom- und Gaspreise helfen. Preisblätter und Wirtschaftspläne lassen sich automatisiert erstellen (https://stadtwerketools-energie.de/). 

c)	Strategie- und Digitalisierungsstrategieberatung
Neben der klassischen Strategieberatung haben wir uns über die Entwicklung von digitalen Reifegradmodellen sowie dem Digitalisierungsindex für die deutsche Wasserwirtschaft (https://digitalisierungsindex-wasserwirtschaft.de/) das Wissen angeeignet, um zusammen mit dem IWW Zentrum Wasser Unternehmen bei ihren Digitalisierungsstrategien zu begleiten. 

d)	Maschinelles Lernen und Datenvalidierung
Eigene Fachkompetenz hilft uns zum einen mittels Daten Prognosen für und Optimierungen von wasser- und abwasserwirtschaftlichen Prozessen zu erstellen. Unser Schwerpunkt liegt vorgelagert in der Erstellung und Anwendung von Datenvalidierungsalgorithmen.

e)	Unternehmenskulturberatung
Wir begleiten Unternehmensleitungen, Abteilungen oder ganze Unternehmen in der Frage, wie sie auf neue strategische Herausforderungen mit einer veränderten Unternehmenskultur reagieren wollen. 

f)	Internationale Beratung
In Ländern wie u.a. Albanien, China, Jemen, Jordanien, Kenia, Libanon, Sambia, Tansania und Uganda begleiten wir u.a. über die GIZ beim Aufbau von Regulierungsinstitutionen, der Aufstellung und Umsetzung nationaler Wasserstrategien, der Unterstützung bei der Lösung von Wasserkonflikten und der Entwicklung von Tarifmodellen und Benchmarking. 

g)	Studienerstellung
In regelmäßigen Abständen werden wir von Verbänden, Unternehmen oder Ministerien für die Erstellung von Studien oder Expertisen beauftragt.

- Plantas de ósmosis inversa y ultrafiltración
- Plantas de tratamiento de aguas residuales
- Calderas
- Condensadores

Trabajamos con las marcas líderes en el mercado, como Hydranautics, Walchem, Clack, Pentair, Grundfos, Hach, AWC, John Guest, entre otras.

Nuestro objetivo es crear relaciones largas con nuestros clientes, en las que somos una solución y soporte técnico constante para sus necesidades de agua.

Name: hydrograv GmbH
Description:
hydrograv - Excellence in CFD-based flow optimization for the water industry

As internationally recognized experts for flow simulations (CFD) in water management, the hydrograv team stands for quality, innovation and competence. 
With its interdisciplinary team, hydrograv, a spin-off of the water management and engineering faculties of KIT (Karlsruhe) and the University of Dresden, combines extensive practical experience with the creativity and research spirit of leading institutions.

Our success proves the worth:
- Over 1,000 successful CFD projects worldwide to date - from drinking water reservoirs with reduced water age to improved rainwater treatment and the optimization of all reactors in sewage treatment plants
- Hundreds of satisfied customers in water supply, wastewater treatment and sewage systems
- Significant performance increases for more than 1,000 secondary clarifiers at over 300 wastewater treatment plants - from small plants to "Atotonilco" (Mexico City); the world's largest new wastewater treatment plant construction in recent decades!
- For over 15 years, more than 100 hydrograv adapt systems have been increasing the effluent quality and reducing the need for new secondary clarifiers

With our patented "hydrograv adapt" systems, we effectively optimize secondary clarifiers: 
- Increase tank loading capacity by 25 - 30% and more - stop sludge discharge!
- Reduction of suspended solids to filtration level: thanks to adapt, many energy and cost-intensive filters could be switched off or were not built at all

New: 
with "hydrograv adapt 2.0" including phosphorus elimination ring, we are once again setting new standards: 
Total P values of < 0.4 mg/l without filtration are routine - and < 0.2 mg/l in the wastewater treatment plant effluent without filtration has already been achieved several times

Cutting-edge technology for wastewater treatment plants: each installation is tailored precisely to your needs using extensive individual CFD simulations!

Nuestro compromiso va más allá del tratamiento del agua: optimizamos su uso, minimizamos el impacto ambiental y fomentamos un futuro sostenible a través de la eficiencia hídrica y la economía circular.

𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐨 𝐜𝐨𝐧 𝐥𝐚 𝐬𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐝 𝐲 𝐥𝐚 𝐢𝐧𝐧𝐨𝐯𝐚𝐜𝐢ó𝐧

	• Soluciones a medida diseñadas para satisfacer los requisitos específicos de cada sector, desde el consumo doméstico hasta procesos industriales.
	• Implementación de estrategias alineadas con los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible, en especial el ODS 6 (agua limpia y saneamiento). 

Creemos que la educación es clave para generar un impacto positivo en la gestión del agua. Por ello, creamos 𝖴𝖭𝖠𝖰𝖴𝖠 𝖠𝖼𝖺𝖽𝖾𝗆𝗒, un espacio de formación dedicado a promover la gestión hídrica sostenible, la eficiencia en el uso del agua y la economía circular aplicada al agua. 

A través de esta iniciativa, capacitamos a individuos y empresas para optimizar este recurso y reducir su impacto ambiental.

Trabajar con UNAQUA es apostar por un futuro más sostenible, asegurando el acceso a agua tratada según las necesidades de cada sector y fomentando su uso eficiente y responsable.

Name: AQUATHEA – Next-Gen Water Systems for Industry, Humanitarian Aid & Resilient Communities
Description:
Aquathea is a mission-driven company dedicated to solving one of the world’s most pressing challenges: access to safe water. We develop off-grid, sustainable technologies that generate, regenerate, and purify water in some of the most challenging environments on the planet.
Headquartered in France (near Bordeaux), with operational activities in the Middle East (Dubai) and strategic presence in Switzerland (Zug), Aquathea operates internationally, supporting projects across Europe, Africa, and remote territories facing critical water scarcity.
Our focus lies on the last mile — communities and regions where traditional infrastructure fails, and where the need is greatest. With a strong humanitarian commitment, we work alongside NGOs, governments, and institutions to deliver long-term solutions that are resilient, low-emission, and high-impact.

Our three core innovations
AQUASENSE
Atmospheric water generators that extract potable water from the air, even in arid and remote zones.

AQUARECOVERA
Greywater and industrial effluent recovery systems that reduce freshwater demand and environmental pollution.

CALYPSEA
Solar-powered desalination units designed for off-grid coastal and island communities, without fossil energy or complex infrastructure.

Every Aquathea solution is modular, energy-efficient, and designed for rapid deployment — because clean water should never depend on geography or privilege.
Developed in collaboration with leading engineers and validated by institutions such as the Solar Impulse Foundation, our technologies are already making a tangible impact where it matters most.
Aquathea is more than innovation — it is a global call to action.
Behind every drop of water we recover, there is a life transformed:
a school that stays open, a hospital that keeps running, a family that thrives.
We don’t just deliver water —
we deliver dignity, autonomy, and long-term resilience.

Name: ALMAWATECH International
Description:
ALMAWATECH – Engineered Water Treatment Solutions for Industry
ALMAWATECH International is the global division of ALMAWATECH GmbH – a family-owned engineering company from Germany with a long-standing tradition in industrial water and wastewater treatment.

Engineered in Germany, applied worldwide.

 Our Plant Engineering Portfolio

We provide complete systems for wastewater treatment, process water conditioning, ultrapure water production and water reuse – modular, efficient, and tailored to your needs:

• Biological Treatment – Aerobic & anaerobic systems (biofiltration, SBR, MBR, biogas)

• Chemical-physical Systems – Precipitation, coagulation & pH control (e.g., ALMA CHEM MCW, LHPS)

• Membrane Technology – RO, NF, UF for water reuse and process optimization

• Filtration & Ion Exchange – Activated carbon, mixed bed, multi-layer & softening filters

• Oxidation & AOP – ALMA OXI, UV & Fenton for CSB/TOC/micropollutant removal

• Dissolved Air Flotation (DAF) – Efficient separation of solids and fats (ALMA NeoDAF)

• Biogas Systems – UASB, EGSB & GMR reactors for high-load wastewater and energy recovery

 Process Additives – ALMA AQUA

Our ALMA AQUA product line includes high-performance additives for industrial water cycles:

• Cooling systems – e.g. Corrosion inhibitors, biocides, dispersants

• Boiler systems – e.g. Oxygen scavengers, alkalization agents, hardness stabilizers

• Membrane systems – e.g. Antiscalants, acid/alkaline cleaners, pH control

• Wastewater treatment – e.g. Coagulants, flocculants, defoamers

 Serving All Industries

Our technologies are used across a wide range of sectors – including food & beverage, chemicals, recycling, automotive, metal processing, pulp & paper, and energy.

Whatever your water challenge – we deliver the right solution.

Name: MWB – Mittelhessische Wasserbetriebe, Eigenbetrieb der Stadt Gießen
Description:
MWB – Mittelhessische Wasserbetriebe, Eigenbetrieb der Stadt Gießen, beliefert Gießens Bürger*innen jährlich zuverlässig mit 4,7 Mio. Kubikmetern bestem Trinkwasser. Das Trinkwasser stammt aus Brunnen der Stadtwerke Gießen sowie des Zweckverbandes Mittelhessische Wasserwerke.
Zu den Hauptaufgaben von MWB gehört die Abwasserableitung und -reinigung der Stadt Gießen und der Umlandgemeinden. Pro Jahr fließen etwa 25 Mio. Kubikmeter Abwasser (Schmutzwasser + Fremdwasser + Regenwasser) durch das 500 km lange öffentliche Kanalnetz in das Klärwerk. 140 Mitarbeitende kümmern sich auf dem Klärwerk, am Betriebshof Kanal sowie im Technischen Büro um die Planung, den Bau sowie die Instandhaltung und Sanierung des Gießener Kanalnetzes und betreiben das viertgrößte Klärwerk Hessens – damit leistet MWB einen sehr wichtigen Beitrag zum Schutz der kostbaren Ressource Wasser. MWB bildet in sieben Berufen und zwei dualen Studiengängen die Fachkräfte von morgen aus und bietet sichere und abwechslungsreiche Arbeitsplätze in der Stadt an der Lahn.

Description:

La nostra missione è supportare integralmente i nostri clienti, dalla fase di ricerca e sviluppo fino alla messa in opera e alla formazione.

Con oltre cinquant’anni di esperienza nella produzione di evaporatori e cristallizzatori per il trattamento di acqua e liquidi, portiamo una ricchezza di know-how e affidabilità a ogni progetto. Le nostre soluzioni tecnologiche sono progettate per adattarsi alle esigenze uniche di ciascun cliente.

But we’re not just here to clean up messes. We’re here to help people recover—emotionally, financially, and physically—after some of the hardest moments in their lives.

Our company was built by two founders who hit their own rock bottoms—and chose to build something better. With 7 kids between us (yes, we’re a little nuts) and a whole lot of motivation, we set out to create a business rooted in empathy, integrity, and grit. We know what it means to rebuild, and we bring that same energy to every single job.

At Rock Bottom, we treat your home like it’s ours. We show up fast, we communicate clearly, and we don’t leave until the job is done right. Whether it’s a flooded basement, a house fire, or hidden mold—our team brings the tools, the training, and the heart to help you move forward.

Description:
Water Consultants Mansfield: Specialists in Water Treatment, Compliance, and Legionella Risk Assessments. 

ME Environmental specialise in water treatment services and Legionella Compliance consultancy, from our HQ in Mansfield.

Meeting the latest water hygiene and testing regulations is of paramount importance to small, medium, and large businesses alike. With further regulations to water safety in the UK, laws, and best practices, it has never been more important to ensure safety, efficiency, and cost-effectiveness in water treatment.

We are experts in providing bespoke water treatment services and consultancy for your business, allowing you to be fully compliant with the latest legislation, whilst optimising your water processes and consumption. 

As specialists in water treatment services, our expertise naturally extends to providing Legionella compliance services locally and nationally. 

What is Legionnaire’s disease and is Legionella compliance important?

Legionnaire’s is a disease that stems from the consumption (usually inhalation) of water droplets contaminated with Legionella. This disease is a form of pneumonia and can be fatal. Its compliance is therefore of huge importance, but it can be a convoluted process to adhere to regulations.

We have extensive experience as water testing consultants and risk assessments. Our domestic and commercial water treatment services, including leading Legionella compliance and testing services, have benefited many businesses and individuals in Mansfield and nationally through:

Maximising the capacity, availability and water system uptime
Managing unexpected emergency breakdown
Maintaining water quality and quantity requirements
Exceeding safety standards

Our core values are Integrity, Open Two-Way Communication, Empowering Workplace, and Commitment to Excellence. We focus on "Providing families with peace of mind," with a niche in "Safe water, Clean delivery." Our unique strengths include offering both water treatment and plumbing services, representing the Kinetico brand, and being "small enough to care, big enough to help."

Kinetico's non-electric, twin-tank design features a fully automatic control valve that measures water usage and initiates regeneration only when necessary, reducing regenerant use and eliminating costly electronic repairs. The twin softening tanks ensure a continuous supply of soft water, with each tank cleaning its twin using soft water.

As a family-owned company, we prioritize building strong relationships with our customers and fostering a supportive environment for our employees, viewing them as part of our extended family. We aim to provide helpful tips and tricks to assist customers in maintaining and using their equipment effectively. Our commitment is to deliver exceptional service, ensuring peace of mind for the families we serve and those within our organization.

Name: IMFilter Uzdatnianie wody
Description:
Kiedy w 1994 roku pewien człowiek zdecydował się podjąć problem jakości wody płynącej z naszych kranów, niewiele osób mogło pozwolić sobie na luksus posiadania urządzeń zapewniających wysoką jej jakość, a wiedza w tym temacie była niewielka. Dziś, ten sam człowiek nadal skupiony na tym samym temacie jest bogatszy o 28 lat doświadczeń i wiedzy praktycznej. Dziś też zagadnienie jakości wody jest coraz bardziej powszechne, a dostępność różnorodnych urządzeń jest również ogromna. Dlatego ważne jest, aby umieć dostosować technologię uzdatniania do parametrów wody.

Tym właśnie zajmuje się nasza firma – celem jest zaopatrzenie naszych Klientów w najlepszej jakości wodę dostosowaną do ich potrzeb. Zróżnicowane parametry wody wymagają zastosowania odpowiednich technologii oraz urządzeń. Pracujemy na sprzęcie najlepszej jakości, aby zapewnić jak najdłuższe i bezproblemowe ich funkcjonowanie.

Uzdatnianiem wody zajmujemy się kompleksowo: od poboru próbek wody oraz jej badań, poprzez dobór technologii i prace wykonawcze skończywszy na stałym nadzorze technicznym i dostawie komponentów. Obsługujemy Klientów zarówno indywidualnych jak i firmy oraz zakłady przemysłowe.

Jesteśmy dynamicznie rozwijającą się firmą z wieloletnim stażem i sporym bagażem doświadczeń. Służymy naszym Klientom fachową pomocą i radą w zakresie uzdatniania wody, a nowe wyzwania są naszą siła napędową i sposobem pozyskiwania nowej wiedzy i doświadczeń.

Rzesza Klientów pozyskana w trakcie wielu lat funkcjonowania naszej firmy jest najlepszym wykładnikiem naszych możliwości i poświadczeniem, że współpraca z nami jest oparta na pełnym profesjonalizmie. To ich rekomendacje sprawiają, że rośnie liczba osób, które korzystają z naszych usług.

Name: Abwasser-Consulting Ertl & Plihal ZT GmbH
Description:
PROBLEMLÖSUNG:

Wir freuen uns über jede Herausforderung der Abwasserwirtschaft, die an uns herangetragen wird. Wir helfen Ihnen z.B. bei betrieblichen Problemen auf der Kläranlage, bei der Wahl der richtigen Technologie bei der Kanalinspektion oder bei der Klimawandelanpassung im urbanen Regenwassermanagement und bei allen möglichen Fragestellungen!

PLANUNG:

Wenn Sie etwas Neues errichten wollen oder bestehende Systeme an aktuelle und zukünftige Herausforderungen anpassen müssen, dann sind Sie bei uns richtig. Wie bieten Planungsleistungen von der Wasserversorgung bis hin zu Oberflächen- und Abwasserentsorgung an.

SACHVERSTÄNDIGER:

Wir sind für folgende Bereiche als allgemein beeidete und gerichtlich zertifizierte Sachverständige für juristische Verfahren zugelassen:

+ Abwassertechnische Anlagen
+ Zustandserfassung-, klassifizierung, -bewertung, -beurteilung und Sanierung von Schächten, Kanälen und Sonderbauwerken und Entwicklung von Instandhaltungs- und Sanierungsstrategien

CONSULTING:

Gerne beraten wir Sie und Ihr Abwasserunternehmen im technisch-sozioökonomischen Sinne, bei der Interaktion mit Behörden oder mit Anbietern von Service und Technologien. Dabei finden wir gemeinsam eine nachhaltige Lösung für alle internen und externen Beteiligten im betrieblichen oder kommunalen Kontext.

BETRIEBSFÜHRUNG:

Unser Team hat Erfahrung in der Betriebsführung von Kanalisationsanlagen. Wir befassen uns in wissenschaftlicher Weise mit der strategischen Optimierung des Kanalmanagements.

LEHRE / ERWACHSENWEITERBILDUNG:

Univ.Prof. DI Dr. Thomas Ertl ist Professor für Siedlungswasserbau und Gewässerschutz an der Universität für Bodenkultur Wien und bildet dort vorwiegend MasterstudentInnen abwasserwirtschaftlichen Themen aus. Gemeinsam mit DI Dr. Hanns Plihal leitet er die Ausbildung des Betriebspersonals von Kanalisationsanlagen beim ÖWAV.

Name: Equus Environmental
Description:
Equus work with environmentally friendly, evaporative cooling technology and filtration systems to keep stables beautifully cool and provide a constant supply of clean filtered air, even in the hottest weather.



Stable block designs have undoubtedly developed in the last decade, we’ve come a long way from wooden boxes with little ventilation, however, whatever the material Stables can still retain heat. 



Little airflow within stables can increase the risk of equine respiratory diseases such as strangles, equine influenza, equine asthma and herpesviruses. Contributors like dust, pollen and moulds from bedding, feed and even pollutants from air outside can all congest an enclosed environment despite windows and doors.



The process of rest and recovery is vastly important to a horse in work for elite performance. The passive recovery process should therefore occur in sufficient temperatures and air quality conditions.

Ce système Performant et Autonome permet de réduire jusqu’à 99,7% le taux de Matières En Suspension (MES), répond aux exigences européennes, il a un très faible encombrement et une maintenance limitée. Le système est capable de traiter de 1 à 3000m3/heure.
Filtres In Motion permet donc à ses clients de réduire de façon importante les coûts d’exploitation, de répondre aux exigences réglementaires mais aussi d’améliorer la responsabilité sociétale des entreprises (RSE) en répondant aux enjeux du développement durable, aussi bien dans leurs activités que dans leurs interactions avec leurs parties prenantes.

KERO Pump är ett familjeföretag som ägs av Roger Olsson.

KERO Pump bildades i augusti 1982 av Roger Olsson och Karl Erik Andersson. Där av namnet KERO, Karl-Erik och Roger Olsson.

Företaget är idag ett väletablerat och certifierat pumpföretag som har sitt säte i Södertälje med ett tiotal anställda.

Medarbetarna på KERO Pump har upp till 40 års erfarenhet inom pumpbranschen och är diplomerade pumptekniker. 1997 byggdes det vi idag kallar ”KEROhuset” som är beläget i Weda Industriområde. Här finns butik, kontor och serviceverkstad.

Verksamheten är inriktad på installation, service, försäljning, och uthyrning av pumpar, högtryckstvättar och städmaskiner med dess kringutrustning. Våra kunder är både små och stora företag, kommuner, bostadsrättsföreningar och privatpersoner.

År 2016 certifierade vi oss enligt ISO 9001, 14001 och OHSAS 18001 och 2019 samt 2022 omcertifierade vi oss. År 2021 gick vi från OHSAS 18001 till ISO 45001.

Vi är certifierade och auktoriserade av ett flertal pumpleverantörer.

Se mer info på vår hemsida www.keropump.se

Name: RioMaisFrio Climatização e Elétrica
Description:
A RioMaisFrio é uma empresa especializada em climatização e elétrica, localizada no Rio de Janeiro. Com uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiente, estamos comprometidos em fornecer serviços de instalação e manutenção de ar condicionado split da mais alta qualidade para nossos clientes.

Nossa missão é oferecer soluções eficientes e personalizadas para atender às necessidades de climatização de residências, empresas e espaços comerciais em toda a região do Rio de Janeiro. Compreendemos a importância do conforto térmico e da qualidade do ar para o bem-estar e a produtividade, e estamos empenhados em garantir que nossos clientes desfrutem de ambientes perfeitamente climatizados.

Principais Serviços

Instalação de Ar Condicionado Split: Nossa equipe técnica altamente capacitada possui amplo conhecimento na instalação de sistemas de ar condicionado split. Desde pequenos ambientes residenciais até grandes espaços comerciais, estamos preparados para fornecer soluções personalizadas de acordo com as necessidades de cada cliente. Garantimos uma instalação precisa e de qualidade, levando em consideração fatores como a localização ideal da unidade interna e externa, a adequada vedação das tubulações e o correto dimensionamento do equipamento.

Manutenção de Ar Condicionado Split: A manutenção regular é essencial para garantir o desempenho ideal e a durabilidade do seu sistema de ar condicionado split. Nossos técnicos especializados estão prontos para realizar serviços de manutenção preventiva e corretiva, incluindo limpeza dos filtros, verificação dos componentes elétricos, inspeção das tubulações e testes de funcionamento. Oferecemos planos de manutenção personalizados, adaptados às necessidades individuais de cada cliente, com o objetivo de prolongar a vida útil do equipamento e garantir o melhor desempenho possível.

Outros Serviços: Além da instalação e manutenção de ar condicionado split, a RioMaisFrio também oferece uma variedade de serviços.

Description:
شركة كشف تسربات المياه هي شركة تتخصص في الكشف عن تسربات المياه داخل المنازل والمباني التجارية والحكومية. وتتوفر الشركة على أفضل الأجهزة والتقنيات للكشف عن التسربات بدقة عالية وسرعة كبيرة، مما يتيح للشركة تقديم خدمة متميزة لعملائها.

تعتمد شركة كشف تسربات المياه على الأجهزة الحديثة والتقنيات المتطورة في عملية الكشف عن التسربات. فمن خلال استخدام الأجهزة الحساسة للصوت والمياه والحرارة، يمكن للفنيين في الشركة تحديد مكان التسرب بدقة عالية، وهذا يساعدهم على إجراء عمليات الإصلاح بكفاءة وسرعة.

تتميز شركة كشف تسربات المياه بخدماتها المتكاملة والمتميزة، فهي تقدم خدمات الكشف عن التسربات وأيضاً خدمات الإصلاح والترميم، وبأسعار تنافسية وجودة عالية. كما أن الشركة تضم فريق عمل متخصص ومدرب على أفضل الأساليب والتقنيات للكشف عن التسربات وإصلاحها.

وتقدم الشركة خدماتها في العديد من المدن بالمملكة العربية السعودية، بما في ذلك الدمام والخبر والاحساء والظهران، وتعمل على تقديم خدماتها على مدار الساعة طوال أيام الأسبوع، مما يجعلها الخيار الأمثل للعملاء الذين يواجهون مشاكل في التسربات.

بالإضافة إلى ذلك، تهتم شركة كشف تسربات المياه بتقديم النصائح والإرشادات اللازمة للعملاء حول كيفية الحفاظ على الأنابيب والحمامات والخزانات والاماكن المعرضة للمياه بشكل دائم

Name: Serasu Su Arıtma Sistemleri
Description:
Serasu Adana Su Arıtma: Saf, Taze ve Sağlıklı Su Kaynağınız

Günümüzde temiz su kaynaklarına olan talep her geçen gün artmaktadır. İnsan sağlığı için hayati öneme sahip olan suyu güvenli ve sağlıklı bir şekilde tüketmek, her bireyin hakkıdır. Bu bilinçle hareket eden Serasu, Adana'da su arıtma sektöründe öncü bir marka olarak hizmet vermektedir.

Serasu, modern teknoloji ve uzman kadrosuyla donatılmış su arıtma sistemleri sunmaktadır. Markamız, suyu en etkili şekilde arıtırken, doğallığı ve tazeliği de koruyarak size içme suyu olarak sağlamaktadır. Sağlık standartlarına uygunluk ve kaliteye odaklanarak, evlerinizde, iş yerlerinizde veya herhangi bir alanda sağlıklı su kaynağı sağlamayı hedeflemekteyiz.

Serasu Adana Su Arıtma sistemlerimiz, benzersiz tasarımı ve yüksek performansıyla öne çıkmaktadır. Gelişmiş filtrasyon teknolojileri sayesinde, suyunuzdaki klor, ağır metaller, toksinler ve mikroorganizmalar gibi zararlı maddeleri etkin bir şekilde uzaklaştırırız. Bu sayede, içme suyunuz temiz, berrak ve taze bir lezzete sahip olur.

Markamızın misyonu, her bireyin sağlığını koruyan ve hayat kalitesini artıran bir su kaynağı sunmaktır. Bunun için yüksek kalite standartlarına uyan, güvenilir ve sürdürülebilir malzemeler kullanmaktayız. Arıtma sistemlerimizin her aşamasında kalite kontrolü yaparak, en iyi sonuçları elde etmenizi sağlıyoruz.

Serasu Adana Su Arıtma, siz değerli müşterilerimize en iyi hizmeti sunmak için müşteri memnuniyetini odak noktamız haline getirmiştir. Uzman ekibimiz, sizin ihtiyaçlarınızı anlamak ve size en uygun çözümleri sunmak için her zaman hazırdır. Arıtma sistemlerimizi kurmak, bakımını yapmak ve teknik destek sağlamak için size adım adım rehberlik ederiz.

Saf, taze ve sağlıklı suya erişim, yaşam kalitenizi yükseltecektir. Serasu Adana Su Arıtma olarak, bu hedefe ulaşmanız için sizinle birlikte çalışmak istiyoruz. Markamızın adı, güvenilirliği ve kaliteyi temsil etmektedir.

Name: Continuous Flow
Description:
Continuous Flow is a trusted and dedicated backflow testing and repair company committed to ensuring the safety and purity of your water supply. Our expert team specializes in inspecting and maintaining backflow preventer valves to prevent any undesirable reverse flow and protect your potable water from potential contamination. With a focus on professionalism, reliability, and exceptional customer service, we take pride in safeguarding your water system, making it our priority to maintain a continuous and uninterrupted flow of clean water. Partner with Continuous Flow for peace of mind, knowing that your water quality is in the hands of experienced professionals who value safety and water integrity above all else.

At Continuous Flow, we understand that water is more than just a natural resource — it's a fundamental building block of our daily lives. With 71% of Earth covered by water and nearly 60% of our bodies composed of this vital element; clean, safe water is essential for our health and well-being. Whether it's nourishing us, supporting daily activities, or sustaining the systems that keep us thriving, water must flow freely and uncontaminated.

Our expert backflow prevention services ensure that your water supply remains pure and safe. Backflow occurs when water flows in the wrong direction, potentially introducing harmful contaminants into your clean water system. At Continuous Flow, we are dedicated to protecting the integrity of your water by preventing backflow and ensuring that the water you use in your home or business stays as nature intended: clean, reliable, and life-sustaining.

From inspection to maintenance, we provide peace of mind, knowing that the water running through your pipes meets the highest standards of safety. After all, your health and safety — just like water — are too important to compromise.

We use only the best EPA-registered products to protect human health and the environment. 

Over the years Better Air Quality has continued to innovate and advance the industry. Our techniques and skills developed over the course of performing thousands of jobs. The way we clean air ducts and HVAC systems now doesn’t even resemble the way we cleaned systems in our early years. Better Air Quality is still a local family-owned New York company and not a franchise. We have been in the business of cleaning air ducts and HVAC systems for over 30 years now. We are a heating and air conditioning contractor that specializes in cleaning air ducts, air handlers, furnaces, air conditioners, and coils in commercial buildings, schools, health care facilities, and more. Better Air Quality has cleaned the air ducts and air handlers in over 100,000 buildings.

The name Better Air Quality comes from our powerful Better Air Quality Trucks that we custom-built to meet our stringent specifications. We have always believed that the key to professionally cleaning heating and air conditioning systems is to have tremendous suction power. No other air duct cleaning vacuum trucks or portable equipment even comes close to generating the type of suction power the Better Air Quality Truck will produce.

Unser Produkt lipasan Fist vollkommen biologisch und nachhaltig. 

lipasan F ermöglicht einen umweltfreundlichen und vollständigen Abbau von Fettablagerungen, die sonst negative Auswirkungen auf Abwassersysteme haben könnten.

Druckleitungen bleiben dank lipasanF frei von Ablagerungen, wodurch ein reibungsloser Abfluss gewährleistet ist.

In der Gastronomie und in der Hausverwaltung sorgt es für ein freies Rohrsystem. lipasan F verhindert die Geruchsbildung im Abwassersystem. 

Die Mikroorganismen von lipasan F erreichen selbst schwer zugängliche Stellen, fördern den biologischen Abbau im Kanal und setzen diesen in Kläranlagen fort.

lipasan F wird gebrauchsfertig geliefert und kann sowohl manuell vor Ort dosiert als auch vollautomatisch in das System eingeleitet werden, was eine einfache Anwendung ermöglicht.

Durch den Verzicht auf mechanische Reinigung entfallen kostspielige Reparaturen, was zu insgesamt niedrigeren Kosten führt.

lipasan F-Mikroorganismen arbeiten kontinuierlich 24 Stunden am Tag und sieben Tage die Woche.

Name: BMV Restoration Services Corp.
Description:
1. Additional Water Extraction
If necessary, the process may consist of using portable extractors to remove any excess water that's soaking carpet, should the carpet be deemed salvageable. In other cases, the carpet may need to be removed and discarded.

2. Demolition & Debris Removal
In many cases of water damage, certain building materials (i.e., drywall down to the studs, carpeting, carpet padding, etc.) may need to be removed if it cannot be salvaged. This process normally occurs before drying out of the property takes place, as removing drywall to expose wall cavities and carpeting to expose subflooring can result in a more efficient overall drying process. If it's determined that no structural damage occurred, then restoration companies can typically skip this step and move on to drying out the property.

3. Final Dry Out
Next, your contractor will strategically arrange air movers to help dry out the property and position dehumidifiers to remove moisture from the air. With the right drying plan, it's not uncommon for the property to dry out in a matter of just a few days.

4. Antimicrobial Application
In some water damage situations, fungal and mold growth may be a concern. Under the right circumstances, it can take as little as 24 hours for mold to begin growing, so whether it's out of caution or out of necessity, a restoration company may deem it necessary to apply antimicrobials to prevent mold growth or destroy existing mold spores.

5. Contents Restoration
Though any type of property damage has the potential to ruin certain belongings, contents restoration technologies have advanced to a point today where many items are also salvageable. Usually near the beginning of the restoration process, a contents pack out will occur. This consists of a restoration company removing saveable contents such as textiles, clothes, hard goods, photos, electronics and more, and taking them off site to restore. Not every item can be saved, but many can.

Name: Salino
Description:
A Salino Piscinas Salinizadas é uma empresa especializada na produção e aluguel de Geradores de Hipoclorito de Sódio, oferecendo soluções inovadoras para o tratamento e desinfecção da água de piscinas através da eletrólise do sal. Nosso método é natural e ecologicamente correto, garantindo a pureza e segurança da água para empresas de diversos setores  - como academias, clínicas, clubes, condomínios, escolas e hospitais.

Fundada em 2003 em Brasília, a Salino rapidamente se destacou no mercado, fornecendo seus Geradores de Hipoclorito de Sódio para as principais academias e clubes da capital brasileira. Em 2006, lançamos com exclusividade o Sistema Selado de Alta Concentração (SAC), que sanitiza a água da piscina por eletrólise do sal sem deixá-la salgada, preservando a integridade dos equipamentos e proporcionando todos os benefícios da salinização.

Nossa Tecnologia

Nosso equipamento foi desenvolvido com o objetivo de não adicionar sal à água da piscina, reduzindo significativamente a corrosão de bombas, filtros e escadas de inox. Com mais de 20 anos de experiência no mercado, a Salino já tratou mais de 500 piscinas, está presente em 7 estados brasileiros e cuida de mais de 100 milhões de metros cúbicos de água.

Name: Aircon Audit
Description:
Aircon Audit – Your Trusted Partner for TM44 Air Conditioning Inspections Across England and Wales

Aircon Audit specialises in providing professional TM44 air conditioning inspections to commercial buildings throughout England and Wales. We understand the importance of compliance, energy efficiency, and safety when it comes to your air conditioning systems.

A TM44 inspection is a legal requirement for all air conditioning units with a total cooling output of 12kW or more and over five years old. These inspections ensure your systems are running efficiently, helping you reduce energy costs and avoid potential fines for non-compliance.

Our service offers:

Fast, reliable TM44 inspection reports
Clear, easy-to-understand recommendations
Nationwide coverage across England and Wales
Competitive and transparent pricing
Flexible scheduling to minimise disruption

With extensive experience in the HVAC industry and a commitment to customer satisfaction, Aircon Audit takes the stress out of maintaining your building’s air conditioning compliance. Whether you manage a single office or multiple commercial properties, we provide tailored solutions to fit your needs.

Get in touch today to ensure your air conditioning systems meet legal requirements, operate efficiently, and contribute to a greener future.

Name: Alaska Water sp. z o.o.
Description:
Naszą działalność rozpoczęliśmy w 1998 roku. Przez pierwsze lata wyspecjalizowaliśmy się w sprzedaży, instalacji i serwisowaniu filtrów kuchennych. Gdy w 2012 roku stery w firmie przejęło następne pokolenie naszej rodziny konsekwentnie postawiliśmy na poszerzenie naszej wiedzy, oferty produktowej w oparciu o sprawdzone rozwiązania i produkty światowych liderów z branży uzdatniania wody. Dzięki tej współpracy dziś nasze rozwiązania znajdziesz w mieszkaniach, domach, szkołach, przedszkolach, salonach urody, laboratoriach, fabrykach, galeriach handlowych, ośrodkach wypoczynkowych, piekarniach oraz placówkach medycznych.

Zadowolenie naszych Klientów jest dla nas sprawą najważniejszą, dlatego też dokładamy wszelkich starań, aby zamówienia były realizowane błyskawicznie, a oferowany towar był najwyższej jakości. Dzięki zaangażowaniu naszych pracowników posiadających doświadczenie w doborze, instalowaniu oraz serwisowaniu urządzeń do filtrowania wody, produkty zakupione w naszym sklepie internetowym będą pod opieką przez cały czas ich używania tak aby radość z krystalicznie czystej wody była dla Ciebie niczym nie zakłóconą czystą przyjemnością.

Dołącz do kilkuset naszych Klientów, którzy nam zaufali i teraz korzystają z oszczędności czasu, pieniędzy i z własnej czystej, zdrowej wody.

Name: Guardian Wastewater
Description:
At Guardian Wastewater Services, we understand the importance of proper maintenance and management of wastewater systems for both homeowners and commercial properties. We specialize in managing, monitoring, and maintaining wastewater systems of various types, including intermittent & recirculating sand filters, geotextile filters, pressure-dosed mounds, aerated lagoons, activated sludge, and constructed wetlands. We serve a wide variety of clients including individual & clustered residential homes, small community systems, retail and commercial facilities, schools, churches, government buildings, hotels and more.

Our services include routine maintenance, monitoring and management, permit and discharge management, and custom operational contracts. With our expertise, we can help you minimize nuisance problems, ensure system operation for the long term and reduce costly repair expenses.

Some of the key features of our company include:
- Trained and experienced technicians
- Customized service plans to fit your specific needs
- Expertise in the latest technologies and advancements in the industry

Our core benefits include:
1. Regular maintenance to keep your system running smoothly
2. Proactive monitoring to catch potential issues before they become a problem
3. Expert troubleshooting and repair services

Ad ogni chiamata, ad ogni preventivo, vi proporremo sempre la soluzione più ragionevole e ottimale per voi. Preventivi chiari, fatture trasparenti, tutto il supporto possibile per accedere ai bonus in essere. Ce lo dite in molti che siamo onesti, ci fa piacere scriverlo chiaramente perché per noi l’onestà è fondamentale.

Rapidi
Essere tempestivi nel nostro lavoro è una delle cose più importanti, perché riscaldamento, climatizzazione e impianto idrico-sanitario sono elementi fondamentali della nostra quotidianità. Ancora più importante è la rapidità in caso di emergenza. Per questo ci impegniamo a rispondere ad ogni chiamata e ad intervenire nel minor tempo possibile.


Professionali
Può sembrare scontato questo aspetto, ma preferiamo non lasciare nulla al caso: cosa significa per noi essere professionali? Aggiornamento costante sia tecnico che normativo. Scelta dei migliori marchi per impianti, condizionamento e riscaldamento. Una rete di partner qualificati (elettricisti, progettisti, tecnici bonus).

"Ho fondato Schizzo srl sulla base della mia ditta individuale attiva da oltre 20 anni in Valdinievole, in Toscana e in tutto il Centro/Nord Italia.

NON CI CAPISCI UN TUBO? CI PENSA SCHIZZO!"
- Paolo Giancoli, Fondatore di Schizzo srl

Name: VODÁRENSKÁ AKCIOVÁ SPOLEČNOST, a.s.
Description:
VODÁRENSKÁ AKCIOVÁ SPOLEČNOST, a.s., vznikla 1. 12. 1993 ze státního podniku JIHOMORAVSKÉ VODOVODY A KANALIZACE. Dodává pitnou vodu a odvádí a čistí odpadní vody více než půl milionu obyvatel v Jihomoravském kraji a v kraji Vysočina. Její služby využívají občané i podnikatelé v 732 obcích v okresech Blansko, Brno-venkov, Jihlava, Třebíč, Znojmo a Žďár nad Sázavou.

K zákazníkům voda přitéká vodovodní sítí dlouhou více než 5 230 kilometrů. Délka provozované kanalizační sítě odvádějící odpadní vody je asi 3 163 kilometrů. Společnost provozuje 86 úpraven pitné vody a 174 čistíren odpadních vod (stav ke konci roku 2023).

VODÁRENSKÁ AKCIOVÁ SPOLEČNOST, a.s., se řadí mezi deset největších vodárenských společností v České republice a zaměstnává asi 1 000 pracovníků. Její chod zajišťuje generální ředitelství v Brně, jím řízené vodohospodářské laboratoře a šest provozních divizí v regionech.

Jediným akcionářem společnosti je Svaz vodovodů a kanalizací měst a obcí s.r.o. V něm jsou sdruženy svazky měst a obcí nebo samostatné obce. VODÁRENSKÁ AKCIOVÁ SPOLEČNOST, a.s., je tedy ryze českou firmou. Tento v tuzemsku ojedinělý vlastnický model zaručuje systematickou údržbu a obnovu vodárenské infrastruktury, do níž plyne většina peněz ze zisku společnosti, ale také z nájemného, které společnost vyplácí vlastníkům infrastruktury.

VODÁRENSKÁ AKCIOVÁ SPOLEČNOST, a.s., kromě provozování vodovodů a kanalizací nabízí také například stavebně-montážní činnost, prodej vodohospodářského materiálu, služby akreditovaných vodohospodářských laboratoří, projekční činnost a další.

Comprehensive Product Portfolio

Gleichzeitig stellen wir uns den stetig wachsenden Anforderungen an die Reinigungsleistung der Kläranlagen im Sinne eines umfassenden Gewässerschutzes. Die Schleswag Abwasser GmbH steht für effiziente und kompetente Entsorgungs-leistungen für Städte und Gemeinden, Bürgerinnen und Bürger.

Durch die Bündelung identischer Leistungen für verschiedene kommunale Kläranlagen in unserem Unternehmen können wir den Kommunen kostengünstige Angebote machen. Davon profitieren Bürgerinnen und Bürger. Wir legen größten Wert auf ein partnerschaftliches Miteinander. Name: FFD Grease Management Solutions
Description:
At FFD Grease Management Solutions, we believe that environmental responsibility and awareness is an important matter for every business. We offer a range of grease traps and accessories to meet the demands of every business, with the aim of reducing build-ups and blockages in drainage systems commonly caused by the fats, oils and greases (FOGs) typically associated with commercial kitchens. 

We supply two main solutions; Grease Traps - which filter and store FOGs from your wastewater for safe disposal and a bioremediation product named 'GreasePak' - this is a fluid which is automatically dosed into your wastewater pipe to break down and digest FOGs into a form much more manageable for water companies.

Unfortunately, there are businesses that still fail to take this issue seriously, hence it becoming a matter of key importance for governing bodies, with a tougher stance being taken with offenders.

Don't be caught out with costly cleaning bills; invest in a quality grease trap to maximise eco-friendly practices and make sure you're doing your bit for the environment.

We have been supplying the catering industry for over 20 years through our parent company specialising in professional refrigeration, FFD Commercial Refrigeration, as well as our dedicated division for commercial catering equipment & accessories, FFD Catering Equipment and understand exactly what our customers need. 

We concentrate on high quality manufacture, outstanding performance and enhanced efficiency, all at low prices and backed by our comprehensive customer service.

Name: Rossi Impianti Srl
Description:
Da oltre 40 anni Rossi Impianti Srl è un punto di riferimento in Veneto per la progettazione, installazione e manutenzione di impianti industriali e antincendio, con sede a Sarego (Vicenza). 

Nata nel 1980, l’azienda affianca imprese manifatturiere e metalmeccaniche, offrendo soluzioni integrate che spaziano dagli impianti idro-termosanitari alla climatizzazione, dal riscaldamento a pannelli radianti alla ventilazione meccanica controllata, fino ai sistemi antincendio e alle pompe di calore ad alta efficienza. 

Il nostro obiettivo è chiaro: ridurre i consumi, aumentare la sicurezza e garantire continuità produttiva, senza fermare la produzione. Siamo partner affidabili di architetti, geometri e imprese edili, ma soprattutto delle aziende che cercano un interlocutore unico e competente capace di seguire ogni fase: dalla consulenza iniziale al sopralluogo gratuito, dalla progettazione al collaudo, fino all’assistenza post-installazione con manutenzione programmata e pronto intervento. 

Ci distinguiamo per la rapidità di risposta, il rispetto dei tempi, la trasparenza nei preventivi e l’uso esclusivo di marchi leader di settore, garanzia di qualità e innovazione. Con un team di tecnici specializzati e un network consolidato di partner termo-tecnici ed elettrici, Rossi Impianti rappresenta la scelta ideale per chi vuole un servizio completo “chiavi in mano”. 

La nostra presenza costante in cantiere e durante i test di funzionamento ci permette di assicurare risultati concreti e duraturi. 

Crediamo in un approccio orientato all’efficienza energetica, alla sostenibilità e alla sicurezza, perché un impianto ben progettato e gestito non è solo un costo ridotto, ma un vantaggio competitivo per l’azienda.

Name: UnTapped Technologies
Description:
At UnTapped Technologies, we’re all about delivering smarter, cleaner water solutions for your home. We know how frustrating hard water can be, those stubborn mineral spots on your faucets, the buildup in your appliances, and the never-ending maintenance. That’s why we created HydroTAC, our game-changing, salt-free water conditioner.

Unlike traditional softeners that rely on salt and constant upkeep, HydroTAC uses advanced Template Assisted Crystallization (TAC) technology to prevent scale buildup and even reduce existing scale. That means your appliances run better, last longer, and your water feels fresher, all without the hassle. Plus, with our dual cartridge design, you’re not just protecting your appliances; you’re also improving water quality with an activated carbon block that filters out contaminants.

Eco-friendly, low-maintenance, and effective, HydroTAC is the smarter choice for whole-home water conditioning. Let us help you enjoy cleaner, better water from every tap!

Name: Abwassergesellschaft Gelsenkirchen mbH / Gelsenkanal
Description:
Die Abwassergesellschaft Gelsenkirchen mbH / Gelsenkanal – ist ein kommunales Dienstleistungsunternehmen, das für die sichere, zuverlässige und umweltgerechte Beseitigung des Abwassers in Gelsenkirchen verantwortlich ist. Als Teil der städtischen Daseinsvorsorge erfüllen wir eine zentrale Aufgabe für die Infrastruktur der Stadt und tragen damit wesentlich zum Schutz von Umwelt, Gesundheit und Lebensqualität bei.
Zu unseren Kernaufgaben gehört die Ableitung des Abwassers. Wir betreiben und unterhalten ein weit verzweigtes Kanalnetz mit einer Länge von rund 700 Kilometern sowie zahlreiche Pumpwerke und Sonderbauwerke. Damit stellen wir sicher, dass das Abwasser der Haushalte und Betriebe jederzeit zuverlässig gesammelt und abgeleitet. Ein weiterer Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Regenwasserbewirtschaftung. Ziel ist es, Niederschläge so zu steuern, dass die Kanalisation entlastet wird und Risiken wie Überflutungen oder Rückstau minimiert werden.
Darüber hinaus kümmern wir uns kontinuierlich um die Pflege, Überwachung und Sanierung des Kanalnetzes. Durch regelmäßige Inspektionen, den Einsatz moderner Technik und vorausschauende Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen stellen wir die langfristige Funktionsfähigkeit der Anlagen sicher. Dies gewährleistet nicht nur den Schutz der öffentlichen Infrastruktur, sondern leistet auch einen wichtigen Beitrag zum Gewässer- und Bodenschutz.
Als kommunales Unternehmen arbeiten wir eng mit Bürgerinnen und Bürgern sowie mit Betrieben und Institutionen in Gelsenkirchen zusammen. Wir beraten zu Fragen rund um Grundstücksentwässerung, Rückstauschutz oder die Nutzung von Regenwasser und verstehen uns als zuverlässiger Ansprechpartner in allen Belangen der städtischen Abwasserentsorgung.

Name: Aero Fresca Inc
Description:
Aero Fresca Inc offers two distinct products that function using our patented technology.

The Cirqulair - Our patented technology removes all airborne particles down to .3 Nanometers.   This is 1000 times more effective than any other type of air filtration system.   Indoors, the Cirqulair can clean the dirtiest of air and leave pure non toxic air in it's place.

When installed within the exhaust of a vehicle, the Cirqulair is able to remove all pollutants leaving only clean air to be emitted from the exhaust pipe.

The QuBA has been developed based on years of experience manufacturing innovative air cleaning systems, helping to reduce inhalation of ambient air pollution. In the QuBA, these tried systems are integrated and expanded into a semi-automatic unit for detecting airborne viruses.

THE QUBA IN SHORT
The Quick Breath Analyzer (QuBA) is a test cabin, equipped with a measurement system that detects whether someone is able to pass on the COVID-19 virus – or any other airborne virus – to the next host. People enter the cabin and shout for 8 – 10 sec. The exhaled air is captured and comprehensively analyzed. The device accurately measures the diameters and numbers of all particles that were expelled. Resulting in a positive or negative result, reflecting if a person is contagious now and in the next 24 hours, or not.

The QuBA is registered with CE number NL-CA002-2021-62055

Su, yaşamın temel kaynağıdır ve temiz, sağlıklı suya erişim herkesin hakkıdır. Arisnet olarak, bu bilinçle hareket ediyor ve en gelişmiş su arıtma teknolojilerini sizlerle buluşturuyoruz. Geniş ürün yelpazemizle, her türlü ihtiyaca yönelik su arıtma cihazları sunuyoruz. Ev, ofis, restoran veya sanayi fark etmeksizin, her mekâna uygun çözümlerimiz mevcuttur.

Neden Arisnet?

Gelişmiş Filtrasyon Teknolojileri: Arıtma cihazlarımız, suyunuzu en yüksek kalitede filtreler, zararlı maddeleri uzaklaştırır ve güvenle tüketilebilecek hale getirir.
Güvenilirlik ve Dayanıklılık: Arisnet ürünleri, uzun ömürlü ve güvenilir performans sunacak şekilde tasarlanmıştır.
Servis ve Bakım Desteği: Türkiye genelindeki teknik servis ağımızla, cihazlarınızın bakımını düzenli olarak yapıyor, kesintisiz temiz su teminini sağlıyoruz.
Müşteri Memnuniyeti: Her zaman müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini ön planda tutuyor, ihtiyaçlarını en iyi şekilde karşılamayı hedefliyoruz.
Ürünlerimiz:

Ev ve İş Yeri İçin Su Arıtma Cihazları
Endüstriyel Su Arıtma Sistemleri
Yedek Parça ve Filtre Çözümleri
Misyonumuz:
Her eve ve iş yerine temiz, sağlıklı su ulaştırmak; müşterilerimize en iyi arıtma çözümlerini sunarak güvenilir ve sürdürülebilir hizmetler sağlamak.

Vizyonumuz:
Su arıtma sektöründe yenilikçi çözümler sunarak, Türkiye'de ve global pazarda öncü marka olmak.

Name: Eko-Serwis Polska
Description:
Uzdatnianie wody to dziedzina, którą zajmujemy się od wielu lat. Wykorzystujemy do tego najnowsze technologie poparte wieloletnim doświadczeniem inżynierów z Ameryki, Francji i Niemiec. Realizujemy projekty uzdatniania wody dla: miast, wsi, osiedli, kotłowni, obiektów chłodniczych, szpitali, pralni, restauracji, przemysłu spożywczego, farmaceutycznego, kosmetycznego. Celem naszej działalności jest maksymalne zaspokojenie potrzeb i spełnienie oczekiwań naszych klientów. Dokładamy wszelkich starań, aby nasze systemy uzdatniania wody spełniały najwyższe jakościowe standardy.

Oferujemy najnowocześniejsze urządzenia (zmiękczacze wody, odżelaziacze, wszelkiego typu ﬁltry i systemy filtrujące wodę, lampy UV), które pozwalają oczyścić każdą wodę ze szkodliwych i zbędnych związków chemicznych i mikrobiologicznych. Uzdatnianie wody dla indywidualnych odbiorców jak i dużych instytucji realizujemy kompleksowo:

- doradztwo techniczne i dobór odpowiednich technologii,
- opracowanie schematów i projektów,
- dobór odpowiednich urządzeń,
- montaż i uruchomienie.

Zapewniamy stały serwis gwarancyjny i pogwarancyjny systemów uzdatniania wody, a przede wszystkim atrakcyjną ofertę cenową.  Wieloletnie doświadczenie oraz znajomość specyfiki rynku sprawia, że nasza firma spełnia najwyższe oczekiwania w dziedzinie uzdatniania wody, a stosowane przez nas technologie pozwoliły nam na zdobycie uznania naszych klientów.

Name: Tech Cleaner
Description:

A Tech Cleaner introduziu no Brasil as práticas de higienização de ar condicionado muito antes das normas e legislação vigentes, no ano de 1996.

O foco do nosso negócio é oferecer o melhor padrão de qualidade de vida para os usuários do ambiente climatizado, nos padrões de IAQ (Qualidade de Ar Interno) – ciência que analisa as características químicas, físicas e biológicas do ar interior não residencial em locais de trabalho. Aliada ao suporte dos mais avançados Institutos de Pesquisa do Brasil, a Tech Cleaner oferece também testes laboratoriais, de acordo com NBR ISO/IEC 17.025, para exame das condições do ar do ambiente.

Description:
Revolutionizing Water Solutions: Poseidon Water Products

Poseidon Water Products, under the visionary leadership of Chris Pelton, is reshaping the narrative of global water management. With a dynamic approach and unwavering commitment, we are tackling the pressing issue of water scarcity head-on.

Chris Pelton: A Visionary in Water Solutions

Chris Pelton, a distinguished figure in the water treatment sector, embodies innovation and expertise. He has channeled his extensive experience and passion into Poseidon Water Products, laying the foundation for transformative change.

Pioneering Solutions for a Global Crisis

The world's water resources are under immense strain, and Poseidon is not merely an observer of this crisis – we are the solution. Our mission revolves around leveraging state-of-the-art technologies, employing cutting-edge treatment media, and implementing practices that set new industry standards.

Confronting Challenges, Implementing Change

One of our primary challenges is the pervasive presence of PFAS compounds in water sources. At Poseidon, challenges are our call to action. We're committed to pioneering advanced techniques that eradicate PFAS and other contaminants, ensuring the well-being of communities and ecosystems alike.

Local Solutions, Global Impact

Our journey commences within the United States, where we're committed to revolutionizing water treatment practices. By collaborating with industry leaders, communities, and research institutions, we're fostering a culture of innovation and accountability. However, our aspirations extend beyond borders. With a deep-rooted commitment to humanitarian efforts, we're determined to amplify our impact worldwide.

Be a Catalyst for Change

We extend an invitation to join our movement. As a part of Poseidon Water Products, you become an agent of transformation, contributing to reshaping the water treatment landscape. Our united efforts are propelling the industry towards sustainability and resilience

As a leading provider in the industry, our mission is to redefine the standards of water treatment by delivering advanced, reliable, and effective systems. With a team of experienced experts, we engineer innovative solutions that surpass expectations and address the diverse needs of our customers.

We take pride in offering NSF-certified products, ensuring the highest quality and safest water possible. Trust and reliability are the cornerstones of our brand, and we go above and beyond to deliver on our promises. We understand the importance of protecting the health and well-being of those we serve, and we are dedicated to providing exceptional water quality.

Our story goes beyond the technicalities of water treatment. We believe that water is more than just a necessity; it is a source of vitality, wellness, and pure enjoyment. It is what connects us to nature and fuels our bodies and spirits. By purifying water at its core, we unlock a world of possibilities and create transformative experiences.

But our commitment extends beyond providing exceptional products. We are committed to making a positive impact on our planet and future generations. We embrace sustainable practices throughout our operations, from eco-friendly manufacturing processes to promoting water conservation initiatives. Our goal is to preserve this invaluable resource for generations to come.

Join us on this extraordinary journey as we push boundaries, challenge norms, and pioneer a new era of water purification. Together, we can transform lives, elevate experiences, and shape a world where clean, pure water is a universal standard. Experience the difference with H2O Flow and discover the power of pristine water.

Name: CAST CO., LTD. (www.invcast.com)
Description:
CAST is a deep tech-oriented company engaged in the research and development of microplasma-based advanced oxidation process (AOP) systems for applications related to water, food, and air sanitation. The company focuses on exploring non-chemical approaches to disinfection and purification that aim to improve safety, sustainability, and operational efficiency compared to conventional methods.

CAST’s technology is based on low-temperature microplasma generation, which can produce reactive oxygen species (ROS), including hydroxyl radicals, from ambient air or oxygen under controlled conditions. These reactive species are widely studied for their potential to contribute to the reduction of microorganisms, odors, and certain organic contaminants. CAST’s systems are designed to utilize these principles while minimizing reliance on chemical disinfectants.

The company develops its solutions in a compact and modular format, allowing flexible configuration and adaptation depending on site conditions and operational requirements. Such designs are intended to support use in decentralized or small-scale environments, including agricultural facilities, public sanitation spaces, pilot-scale installations, and emerging infrastructure contexts, subject to appropriate validation and regulatory considerations.

CAST conducts ongoing internal research and engineering activities to improve plasma generation stability, energy efficiency, and system reliability. The company protects its technological developments through intellectual property filings where applicable and pursues pilot testing and collaborative projects to evaluate performance under practical operating conditions.

Through continued research, testing, and responsible deployment, CAST seeks to contribute to the advancement of next-generation sanitation technologies that align with public health, environmental protection, and sustainable infrastructure objectives.

Nos services comprennent :
- Hydrocurage : élimination des obstructions et débris dans les canalisations grâce à des équipements de pointe, assurant un flux fluide et une performance optimale.
- Dégorgement de canalisation : intervention rapide et efficace pour débarrasser les canalisations des bouchons et des accumulations, préservant ainsi l'intégrité de vos réseaux d'assainissement.
- Entretien des bacs à graisse : nettoyage régulier et entretien préventif des bacs à graisse, essentiels pour assurer le bon fonctionnement de vos installations et la conformité aux normes environnementales.

En tant que partenaire en assainissement, nous comprenons l'importance cruciale d'une gestion efficace des eaux usées pour votre activité ou votre collectivité. Name: HydroGuard Africa
Description:
About HydroGuard Africa

Turning Every Drop Into Data.

HydroGuard Africa is a water efficiency and innovation initiative under Nanotech Labs Kenya, dedicated to helping Water Service Providers (WSPs) reduce Non-Revenue Water (NRW) through data-driven solutions. We combine digital tools, field analytics, and capacity building to empower utilities to detect leaks faster, manage pressure smarter, and recover lost revenue.

With Kenya’s NRW averaging 41% and Africa’s at 35–45%, HydroGuard bridges the gap between reporting and real-time control. Our tailored packages — from self-assessment toolkits to full-scale hydraulic modeling and monitoring — enable WSPs to move from guesswork to precision.

We work alongside engineers, governments, and development partners to build a water-secure, financially sustainable future for Africa’s utilities.

 Focus Areas: Water Audits | Pressure & Flow Management | NRW Reduction | Hydraulic Modelling | Capacity Building
 Our Promise: Smarter data. Stronger systems. Sustainable savings.

 Learn more at www.hydroguard-africa.com

¿Quieres ser distribuidor?

En Ai-Go, transformamos el aire en agua potable, proporcionando soluciones sostenibles, eficientes y respetuosas con el medio ambiente. Nuestros modelos de generadores atmosféricos de agua adaptados para hogares, empresas y hoteles, reduciendo la dependencia de plásticos y optimizando el consumo de recursos naturales.

Estamos en búsqueda de distribuidores en España que compartan nuestra visión de un futuro más verde. Proporcionamos apoyo integral, tecnología innovadora y una oportunidad única para liderar el mercado de soluciones de agua sostenible.

Nuestra misión es cambiar la forma en que las personas acceden al agua, con tecnología limpia y versátil que se adapta a las necesidades de cada cliente. Desde agua natural hasta fría o caliente, nuestras soluciones son ideales para quienes buscan un futuro más verde y sostenible.

Únete al cambio con AI-Go. Agua del aire, para todos.

Aquasolve Water Technology—Nigeria is an engineering-driven water treatment company delivering practical, reliable solutions for Nigeria’s diverse water challenges.

We specialize in the design, installation, and maintenance of water treatment systems for homes, estates, industries, hospitals, schools, farms, and water production businesses. Every system we build is based on proper water analysis, correct process selection, and disciplined workmanship, not trial-and-error installations.

Our capabilities include:
• Borehole & groundwater treatment
• Iron and manganese removal systems
• pH correction and neutralisation
• Multimedia and activated carbon filtration
• Reverse osmosis (RO) systems

At Aquasolve, we believe water treatment is engineering work. Our systems are designed to be durable, serviceable, and fit for long-term operation under local conditions.

We partner with developers, facility managers, manufacturers, farmers, and institutions that value performance, compliance, and sustainability.

Name: WodaGo
Description:
WodaGO zapewnia stały dostęp do czystej wody pitnej z nowoczesnych automatów — 24/7, wygodnie i bez zbędnej obsługi po stronie klienta. 

To rozwiązanie, które sprawdza się zarówno w firmach (B2B), jak i na osiedlach mieszkaniowych (wspólnoty/spółdzielnie/zarządcy nieruchomości).

Nasze urządzenia wykorzystują wieloetapową filtrację (m.in. technologię odwróconej osmozy) oraz mineralizację, a wodę nalewa się do własnych butelek — co ułatwia ograniczenie plastiku i buduje proekologiczny nawyk.

Dla kogo pracujemy:

 Firmy i biura / zakłady pracy
• woda dostępna dla pracowników przez całą dobę,
• mniej logistyki niż w modelu butlowym (zamówienia, dźwiganie, magazynowanie),
• benefit i element ESG w prostym wdrożeniu.

 Osiedla mieszkaniowe / zarządcy
• praktyczne udogodnienie dla mieszkańców "na miejscu" przez 24/7,
• przejrzysta współpraca i minimum obsługi po stronie administracji,
• rozwiązanie wspierające porządek, wygodę i eko-wizerunek osiedla.

 Co bierzemy na siebie:

Od weryfikacji lokalizacji, przez instalację, po bieżące utrzymanie i serwis — dbamy o to, żeby rozwiązanie działało i nie generowało dodatkowej pracy po Twojej stronie.

 Chcesz sprawdzić, czy Twoja firma lub osiedle kwalifikuje się do instalacji WodaGO?

 Napisz do nas wiadomość na LinkedIn lub przez wodago.pl — podaj miasto + typ lokalizacji (firma/osiedle) + szacunkową liczbę użytkowników, a wrócimy z propozycją.

Name: Intrix OneTap Pty Ltd
Description:
Intrix OneTap Australia is a specialist provider of compact, specification-ready instant water systems purpose-built for projects where space, reliability and whole-of-life value matter.
We deliver instant hot, chilled or ambient ultra-filtered water from a single, design-led tap, combining engineered performance with dependable, real-world usability. 
Our systems integrate seamlessly into both new builds and existing kitchens or drink spaces, enabling straightforward retrofits without major joinery modifications, ventilation cut-outs or disruptive renovation works.
Unlike traditional multi-module systems, Intrix OneTap is engineered for low lifecycle complexity. A compact under-sink footprint, streamlined internal architecture and a single annual* filter replacement significantly reduce servicing frequency, minimise downtime and enable predictable, portfolio-wide asset management. 
This makes our solutions particularly well suited to high-use, multi-site environments including residential developments, offices, hospitality, education, aged care and public-sector facilities.
We actively support specifiers, builders, facility managers and procurement teams with technical documentation, design coordination input, installation guidance and long-term maintenance planning. 
Backed by global engineering expertise and supported locally in Australia, Intrix OneTap meets recognised international and Australian compliance standards, including NSF filtration certifications, WaterMark compliance and EESS electrical safety. 
Beyond product supply, we provide ongoing after-sales support designed for operational simplicity, ensuring our systems continue to perform as intended throughout their lifecycle.
We remove complexity from hydration infrastructure, delivering compact, dependable systems that perform in real environments.

A Mega Ar – Climatização e Exaustão foi criada no ano de 2003 e iniciou suas atividades na cidade de Jales no final do mesmo ano, a empresa nasceu para atender a demanda de serviços na área de refrigeração e exaustão.
A empresa atua em toda região de Jales (SP), e também nos estados de Minas Gerais, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul e Goias. Em Maio de 2005 foi inaugurada uma filial da empresa na cidade de Uberaba (MG), denominada Base de Apoio I. A Mega Ar – Climatização e Exaustão é representante exclusiva da marca Gree “A Marca Mundial em ar Condicionado”.
A Mega Ar – Climatização e Exaustão, em sua filial na cidade de Uberaba (MG) inovou ampliando sua linha atendimento, passando também a atuar no ramo de Refrigeração Automotiva e Agrícola, prestando serviço de instalação e manutenção corretiva e preventiva.
A empresa desde 2018 trabalha com a venda, instalação e manutenção de sistemas de Energia Solar.
A empresa conta com uma equipe competente e organizada que vem, até o momento, satisfazendo plenamente as necessidades dos clientes. A política da empresa Mega Ar – Climatização e Exaustão está baseada nos interesses e desejos do cliente, e por isso cada colaborador está apto para prestar o melhor atendimento possível, a buscar sempre a solução mais adequada.

Name: AquaMedia
Description:
Established in Johannesburg South Africa in the year 1989 by a Chemical Engineer Bruce Dalton with a cumulative of 35 years of experience in the fields of Water Filtration, Reverse Osmosis, Ultra Filtration, Water Storage, Remediation, Reclamation Systems and Water Related Equipment. Aqua Media is a recognized leader in the "Science of phase separation and water remediation and reclamation" 

For almost four decades AquaMedia has specialised  in providing turnkey water treatment systems within the African continent as well as the international markets. Our key competences are in engineering designs, manufacturing, installation of containerised drinking water plants, process and membrane systems for various waste water applications, industrial effluent solutions, commercial swimming pool filtration, recreational water parks, as well as the sales and distribution of water purification equipment/components to the market. 

Our team comprises a diverse technical set of skills from steel fabrication, mechanical, chemical, electrical & process engineering with a proven track record for full life cycle of commissioned systems sold and operational in South Africa, Africa, Asia and Europe. Aqua Media is now well established in the design and manufacturing of works within the water treatment market and supports a major portion of the market. 

We pride ourselves in being established in Africa, operated by Africans, to innovate bespoke solutions for Africa and the World.

Name: Healthy Climate Action
Description:
The planet is facing an unprecedented climate crisis, with repercussions threatening ecosystems, public health, and social stability. In response to this emergency, bold and coordinated actions are essential. HCA (Healthy Climate Action), a non-governmental organization dedicated to combating climate change, works to promote sustainable and equitable development. Its mission focuses on protecting vulnerable communities, facilitating a just energy transition, and encouraging environmentally friendly technological innovations.

By adopting inclusive approaches centered on climate justice, gender equity, and the protection of marginalized populations, HCA aims to build a resilient and sustainable future for generations to come. Its main strategic priorities include:

Climate change mitigation and adaptation by strengthening community resilience against climate impacts.
Promotion of renewable energy and technological innovations by developing sustainable solutions for a global ecological transition.
Fighting pollution and protecting human health by reducing environmental hazards to preserve quality of life.
Empowering marginalized populations by supporting vulnerable groups, with a particular focus on women's empowerment.
Through these commitments, HCA positions itself as a key player in promoting inclusive development, mobilizing innovative and equitable solutions to tackle global climate challenges.

HCA's initiatives align with global sustainable development priorities, particularly:

Combating climate change by reducing greenhouse gas emissions and strengthening community resilience (SDG 13).
Promoting renewable energy by facilitating access to clean and affordable energy sources (SDG 7).
Protecting vulnerable populations by addressing inequalities and responding to the needs of marginalized groups, especially women (SDG 5 and SDG 3).
Preserving terrestrial ecosystems by restoring and protecting natural resources (SDG 15).

Name: Nahar Cooling Solution
Description:
Wet Services - Window AC
Gas pressure will be checked before start of the service
Filter, drain pipe and outer panel will be cleaned
Cooling coils and condenser coils will be cleaned
Any water leakage in the drain pipe will be checked carefully
High Pressure jet pumps, will not be used for this service
Performance of the AC will be checked post service
Cooling of the AC depends on multiple factors such as age of the AC, quality of the gas filled, pressure of the gas etc., and Servicing alone does not guarantee improvement in the cooling
Wet Services - Split AC
Gas pressure will be checked before start of the service
Outdoor unit will be checked for any debris, and it will be cleaned
Filter, drain tray and outer panel will be cleaned
Blower wheels, blades and cooling coils will be cleaned
Any water leakage in the drain pipe will be checked carefully
High Pressure jet pumps, will not be used for this service
Performance of the AC will be checked post service
Cooling of the AC depends on multiple factors such as age of the AC, quality of the gas filled, pressure of the gas etc., and Servicing alone does not guarantee improvement in the cooling
Installation - Split AC
Prices mentioned are only labor cost, spare parts cost will be extra.
Ladder/Stool needs to be arranged by the customer
Basis on the thickness and the internal filling of the wall sometimes the professionals need to use core cutting machine for making the provision for split AC and the charges for the same will be charged at actual.
Installation - Window Ac
Provision for installing window AC in the wall or the window needs to be done by a carpenter or a mason. AC professionals will not do this
AC will be installed by the professionals, and its performance will be checked
Gas pressure will be checked post installation
Un-Installation
AC will be checked once before uninstallation
In-case of window AC, the provision needs to be closed by the customer
Gas Charging
Leakage will be checked before gas charging
